title: The Great Crafting Table
description: Forge mod that adds a new crafting table that's able to craft uncraftable items.
body:
The Great Crafting Table Adds a new crafting table that's able to craft uncraftable items like the End Portal Frame, End Portal Block, Nether Portal Block, Fire Block, Soul Fire Block, Invisible Item Frame and Orb of Origin (Forge version). This mod also adds the ability to craft Chainmail armor with Fire and Soul Fire blocks. Not only that, this mod adds a new item called Block Remover which is used to remove any block. This item is used to craft Bedrock in a normal crafting table. The Great Crafting Table works just as a normal Crafting Table but you have to click a "Craft" button and you can only craft one item at a time. To craft the Great Crafting Table use the following recipe in the normal crafting table: Recipes: End Portal Frame:
End Portal Block:
Nether Portal Block:
Fire Block:
Soul Fire Block:
Invisible Item Frame:
Orb of Origin (Forge):
Block Remover:
Enjoy the Great Crafting Table and its recipes!! By RoCris
